texture.detail_rendering: 경광을 통해 매끄럽고 광택 있는 질감을 극대화함

improvement_notes: 조명: 약한 필 라이트로 그림자 디테일 보강. 색감: HSL 패널로 붉은 영역의 클리핑 방지 및 색 깊이감 추가. 구도: S자 곡선이나 대각선 배열로 리딩 라인 형성 또는 소품 추가.
nano_banana_prompt: A top-down flat lay professional food photograph of [FOOD ITEM], scattered dynamically on a minimalist off-white surface. Lit with a single, direct hard light source from the upper-left, creating crisp, dark, well-defined shadows to the lower-right. The lighting creates strong specular highlights on the food's texture. The color palette is vibrant and punchy with extremely high saturation, reminiscent of cross-processed Kodak Ektar 100 film. Shot with a 100mm macro lens at f/11 for deep depth of field. The image is hyper-realistic, ultra-sharp, with rich textures and a bold, graphic, modern aesthetic.
